positive: A stylized, central medallion featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and mysterious cosmic nebula elements blended together. The composition should be highly symmetrical and graphic, like an intricate linework botanical illustration mixed with stained-glass precision. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes of exotic kelp, abstract star clusters, and luminescent jellyfish suspended in deep indigo and turquoise hues, accented by metallic gold leaf accents. The overall mood is magical, serene, and elegant. The design must be suitable for a repeatable, high-contrast apparel print, emphasizing clear lines and solid color blocking.
negative: blur, lowres, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, smudge, grain, noise, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, tiling, cropped, disfigured
